uplink.description: Full payload: battery, ambient temp/humidity, light intensity + alarm, MCU temp, accelerometer, external inputs 1-2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; channel/type headers and field encodings taken from the upstream Apache-2.0 decoder (vendor/tektelic decoder_agriculture_sensor.js) channel map. expected.data computed by running this codec and cross-checked field-by-field against the upstream decoder (battery 3.5 V, temp 25.0 C, RH 50.0 %, light 300 lux, MCU 26.5 C, accel 0.1/-0.1/1.0 g, input1 1390 Hz, input2 860 mV).

uplink.description: Climate-only uplink: sub-zero ambient temperature + relative humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising two's-complement negative ambient temperature (0xFE70 = -400 -> -40.0 C) and odd RH count (155 * 0.5 = 77.5 %). Cross-checked against the upstream decoder.

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (config/downlink-ack port, not a data uplink)
uplink._note: Synthetic error input: the upstream decoder only maps data uplinks on fPort 10; this codec rejects other ports rather than emitting a partial decode.
